terms.title: Terms of Service Agreement
terms.subtitle: Terms of Service · Last updated: 03/01/2026
terms.scope: Applicable to: <bold>Official website 7-mau.com</bold>, all subdomains <bold>*.7-mau.com</bold>, the <bold>zSystems</bold> statistics platform, and all Counter-Strike 2 game servers operated by <bold>7-Mau Community</bold>.
terms.intro: <bold>IMPORTANT NOTICE:</bold> By <underlineIndigo>logging into the website</underlineIndigo> via Steam or <underlineIndigo>connecting</underlineIndigo> to any game server operated by 7-Mau Community, you automatically acknowledge that you have read, understood, and <bold>unconditionally agreed</bold> to all terms below. If you do not agree, your only right is to <highlightRed>stop using the service immediately</highlightRed>.

section1.title: 1. Account & System Identification
section1.steamAuthContent: Our system uses Valve's official connection protocol to authenticate through the Steam gateway. We <highlightRed>do not request or store</highlightRed> your Steam password. You are solely responsible for the security and safety of your Steam account.
section1.identityContent: Each user is identified by a <bold>System Identification Number (7ID)</bold>, <bold>Steam Account Number (SteamID64)</bold>, and <bold>Network Address (IP Address)</bold>. If your account is used by another person to violate 7-Mau regulations, that account <highlightRed>will still be punished without exception</highlightRed>.
section1.ageLimitContent: 7-Mau services and servers are intended only for players who are <bold>18 years old or older</bold>. We recommend that players do not play more than <highlightAmber>180 minutes per day</highlightAmber> in order to protect physical and mental health in accordance with publisher regulations in Vietnam.
section1.accountSharingContent: You are fully responsible for securing your Steam account. The system <highlightRed>strictly prohibits all forms of account sharing</highlightRed> with anyone else (including friends and family members). Any rule violations or bans caused by third parties using your account will still be fully enforced and will not be eligible for ban removal consideration.

section2.title: 2. Anti-Cheat Policy
section2.corePolicy: This is the core foundation of 7-Mau Community. We enforce a <highlightRed>ZERO TOLERANCE</highlightRed> policy against all forms of cheating.
section2.permBanContent: The use of <highlightRed>third-party software</highlightRed> (cheat software, aim assist, wallhack, automated scripts, or repetitive macro hotkeys) that interferes with the game will result in your Steam account and network address being <highlightRed>PERMANENTLY BANNED</highlightRed> across the entire system (Website & Game Servers).
section2.demoContent: Our system automatically stores and analyzes visual match replay footage of all matches. Administrators and Staff of 7-Mau have <bold>full authority to rely on this data</bold> in making account ban decisions <highlightRed>without the obligation to provide source code evidence</highlightRed> or detection algorithms to violators.
section2.evasionContent: Any attempt to create alternate accounts in order to bypass a ban will result in the system <highlightRed>automatically banning all related accounts</highlightRed>.

section3.title: 3. Data & Network Exploitation Regulations
section3.ownershipContent: All processed statistical data, rankings (<bold>Rank/Rating Score</bold>), and display structures shown on *.7-mau.com are the <bold>exclusive property</bold> of 7-Mau Community.
section3.scrapingContent: You are <highlightRed>NOT ALLOWED</highlightRed> to use automated tools, crawlers, or extraction tools to collect data in bulk. Intentionally sending repeated access requests will be considered a denial-of-service attack against the system and will result in <highlightRed>immediate access blocking at the system protection shield level</highlightRed>.

section4.title: 4. Premium Membership Benefits & Contributions
section4.donationNote: All support contributions, weapon skins, or in-game privileges are considered contributions (<bold>voluntary support</bold>) to maintain server operations.
section4.noRefundContent: We <highlightRed>do not accept refunds</highlightRed> under any circumstances, including if your account is banned from the system due to rule violations, or when the system undergoes maintenance or temporary shutdown.
section4.vipRevoke: Administrators and Staff reserve the right to modify, adjust, or <highlightRed>revoke premium membership privileges</highlightRed> at any time if abuse or fraudulent behavior is detected.

section5.title: 5. Disclaimer
section5.availabilityContent: The system is operated on an <bold>"as-is"</bold> basis. We do not guarantee that game servers or web management systems will operate stably at all times without errors.
section5.resetContent: To ensure fairness and system balance, 7-Mau Community reserves the full right to <highlightRed>wipe all statistical data</highlightRed> (statistics, rankings, and rating scores) at any time without compensation or prior notice.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Collection Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy · Last updated: 03/01/2026
privacy.intro: Web Dashboard zSystems — developed by <bold>zhw1nq</bold> and the <bold>7-Mau TEAM</bold> — is a massive data processing engine designed to provide the most detailed statistics (Stats) for the CS2 community on <bold>7-mau.com</bold>. Below is how we collect and operate this data repository.

section1.title: 1. Automatically Collected System Data
section1.note: As soon as you connect to a game server or log into <bold>7-mau.com</bold>, our crawlers and plug-ins immediately collect:
section1.basicDataContent: SteamID32, SteamID64, 7ID (zSystems internal code), current display name, name history, avatar URL, Steam Profile link.
section1.steamStatusContent: Automatic verification of VAC Ban, Game Ban, Trade Ban status, and Steam account level via the Steam Web API.
section1.serverDataContent: Your network IP address, Ping, and country/region information.
section1.telemetryContent: All your actions in the server are recorded, including: movement coordinates, K/D/A history, damage dealt, weapons used, hitboxes hit (headshot, chest, etc.), and chat log data (text).

section2.title: 2. Public Nature of Statistical Data
section2.note: This is the core foundation of the Web Dashboard zSystems.
section2.publicData: All in-game statistics (Stats), Rank, ELO, Match History, and your online status on 7-Mau servers are PUBLIC DATA.
section2.publicAccess: Any user visiting <bold>*.7-mau.com</bold> can search and view your detailed Player Profile in our system.
section2.noPrivateProfile: No anonymity option for Stats: By playing on our servers, you accept that your achievements (and ban history) will be displayed publicly on the leaderboard. To ensure community transparency, we do not support "hiding profiles" (Private Profile) on the web dashboard.

section3.title: 3. Ban Records Data Storage
section3.banData: Data regarding violating accounts (Banned/Muted/Gagged), including 7ID, SteamID, ban reason, duration, and display name at the time of violation will be permanently stored and published in the zSystems Ban List.
section3.sharing: The system may share these ban lists with other CS2 communities/partners to build a cleaner gaming environment.

section4.title: 4. Cookie & Web Session Usage
section4.note: The 7-mau.com web dashboard uses Cookies and Local Storage in your browser to:
section4.cookieUi: Save interface preferences (dark theme / light theme, display language).
section4.cookieAnalytics: Track traffic through analytics tools (such as Google Analytics) to help the administration team evaluate website performance.

section5.title: 5. Internal Data Protection
section5.content: Although your game data is publicly displayed on the Dashboard, sensitive system-level information such as actual IP address, transaction history (VIP purchase), and account link history (Discord / Steam) are encrypted and strictly protected. Only senior administrators (Root Admin) have access to the raw database.

section6.title: 6. Contacting the Administration
section6.intro: For account appeals, web bug reports, or policy questions, please contact us directly through our official channels:

rules.title: Server Rules & Penalty Regulations
rules.subtitle: Server Regulations · Last updated: 05/28/2026
rules.scope: Applicable to all players and Administrators / Staff across all Counter-Strike 2 servers operated by the 7-Mau Community.

portal.title: Rules & Guide System
portal.subtitle: Central hub storing the code of conduct, terms of service, and membership privileges of the 7-Mau Community.
portal.serverDesc: Behavior rules for Administrators / Staff and players, along with a detailed punishment framework (Mute, Kick, Ban).
portal.vipDesc: Detailed information about privileges, command lists for members, and equipment claiming instructions in training mode.
portal.rankDesc: A detailed encyclopedia about the scoring system, rank climbing requirements, VIP/SVIP privilege multipliers, and the deadly ranking point matrix.
portal.termsDesc: Legal agreements regarding accounts, system identification, anti-cheat policy, and data regulations.
portal.privacyDesc: How the zSystems platform collects in-game data, temporary data files, and internal information security policies.

rules.memberRule1: <underlineIndigo>Special Members & Administrators / Staff</underlineIndigo> are required to communicate politely, courteously, and with absolute respect toward all players. They must remain calm to listen, analyze, and thoroughly handle violation cases while avoiding arguments or direct public shaming within the game. Abuse of authority for trolling, harassment, or negatively interfering with player matches is strictly prohibited. Decisions involving <underlineAmber>warning bans</underlineAmber> may only be applied when a player excessively harasses, seriously insults, or intentionally sabotages matches. This is the highest level of protection granted to supporters who contribute to maintaining server operations.
rules.memberRule2: <underline>PLAYERS</underline> are strictly prohibited from using mocking, sarcastic, offensive, or insulting language directly/indirectly against the dignity of players, the 7-Mau server, or any other Counter-Strike 2 gaming community. Players are expected to maintain a respectful and proper attitude toward individuals who contribute financially to keep the servers running. Any acts of racism, regional discrimination, religious insults, political hatred, harassment, or toxic behavior toward other players through voice systems, chat channels, or other 7-Mau platforms will be punished severely without exception.
rules.penaltyCheat: <bold>CHEATING:</bold> Using any third-party software that interferes with the game -> <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed> (No appeals or excuses accepted).
rules.penaltyAdmin: <bold>ADMINISTRATOR / STAFF ABUSE OF POWER:</bold> Actions such as unjustified banning/kicking/muting, insulting players, or abusing authority to sabotage matches -> <highlightAmber>14-DAY BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightAmber>1-MONTH BAN (ADMIN RIGHTS REVOKED)</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed> depending on the severity of the violation.
rules.penaltyVotekick: <bold>SERVER HIJACKING:</bold> Using the vote-kick feature to remove players or gathering to occupy public servers as private practice rooms that negatively affect others -> <highlightAmber>1-DAY BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltyDisrespect: <bold>INSULTING MEMBERS & ADMINISTRATORS / STAFF:</bold> Acts of swearing, threatening, provoking, or defaming reputation -> <highlightAmber>7-DAY BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltySpec: <bold>OPPONENT TRACKING (GHOSTING):</bold> Abusing spectator mode to monitor enemy positions, health, or equipment and relay information to teammates through external communication platforms -> <highlightAmber>7-DAY BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltyWar: <bold>INCITING CONFLICT:</bold> Conducting cyberattacks, forming hostile groups, provoking conflicts, or waging wars against other Counter-Strike communities with the intention of damaging communities -> <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltyScammer: <bold>ITEM SCAMMING:</bold> Performing fraudulent trade activities, spreading malicious links to steal accounts, or impersonating Administrators / Staff for personal gain -> <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltyTroll: <bold>MATCH SABOTAGE:</bold> Intentionally flashing teammates, blocking movement, refusing to confirm readiness, or staying AFK causing match imbalance -> <highlightAmber>7-DAY BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightAmber>1-MONTH BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.penaltyVip: <bold>SLOT ABUSE:</bold> Abusing premium member privileges by repeatedly entering spectator mode to reserve slots or bypass queue positions for friends -> <highlightAmber>1-WEEK BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightAmber>1-MONTH BAN</highlightAmber> => <highlightRed>PERMANENT BAN</highlightRed>.
rules.notePersonal: <bold>IMPORTANT NOTE:</bold> For personal disputes, grudges, or minor toxic behavior in-game, please use the <underlineAmber>VOICE MUTE</underlineAmber> and <underlineAmber>TEXT CHAT MUTE</underlineAmber> functions yourselves to resolve matters privately. The server system and Administrators / Staff will not receive, process, or intervene in personal player disputes.
rules.noteExpiry: <bold>Appeal Deadline:</bold> For all <highlightRed>PERMANENT</highlightRed> punishments, if the player does not submit any valid feedback or appeal to the Administrators / Staff within 12 hours after the ban is applied, the punishment will automatically become permanently effective and <underlineRed>WILL NOT BE REVIEWED</underlineRed> afterward. <bold>THANK YOU!</bold>
rules.noteUpdate: * The above regulations will continue to be updated, revised, and supplemented by Administrators / Staff in real-time to maintain a healthy gaming environment.

vipGuide.title: 3. MEMBERSHIP CONTRIBUTION PRIVILEGE GUIDE
vipGuide.subtitle: Detailed information about privileges, activation instructions, and command references for server-supporting members
vipGuide.section1Title: 1. PRIVILEGES OF PREMIUM & SPECIAL MEMBERSHIP PACKAGES
vipGuide.vipBenefit1: Increase all accumulated reward points by 1.5x with <underlineAmber>1.5x ranking score multiplier</underlineAmber> every match.
vipGuide.vipBenefit2: <underlineAmber>Priority connection</underlineAmber> to servers even when they are full.
vipGuide.vipBenefit3: Ownership of the <highlightAmber>weapon skin customization</highlightAmber> system synchronized directly from the web dashboard into the game.
vipGuide.vipBenefit4: Special victory music option <highlightAmber>(zMVP)</highlightAmber> that plays your favorite song when earning MVP of the round.
vipGuide.svipBenefitExtra: Includes all VIP benefits but with a <underlineRed>double ranking score multiplier (x2.0)</underlineRed> instead of 1.5x, along with these additional privileges:
vipGuide.svipBenefit2: Ability to select customizable character skins <underlineRed>[zSkins]</underlineRed>.
vipGuide.svipBenefit3: Granted access to the basic server <underlineRed>administration panel</underlineRed>.
vipGuide.activationContent: After completing the support contribution process and sending your Steam profile link to the Administrators / Staff, please patiently wait for the server to switch to the next map so the system can automatically synchronize and activate membership privileges on your account.
vipGuide.retakesWeaponsTitle: List of weapons allowed in the server's bombsite retake training mode:
vipGuide.section3Title: 3. ADMINISTRATION COMMAND LIST FOR SPECIAL MEMBERS
vipGuide.svipCmdsTitle: V. ADMINISTRATION COMMAND REFERENCE FOR SPECIAL MEMBERS
vipGuide.cmdAdminDesc: Open the Administration system control panel
vipGuide.cmdBanDesc: Ban players who violate server rules
vipGuide.cmdKickDesc: Kick a player from the current server
vipGuide.cmdMuteDesc: Mute voice and text chat for violating players
vipGuide.cmdMapDesc: Request a change to the current map
vipGuide.mandatoryRule1: It is strictly prohibited to intentionally use spectator mode to reserve empty slots or steal positions from players waiting in queue.
vipGuide.mandatoryRule2: Do not repeatedly call weapons/equipment multiple times in a single round causing interruptions, lag, or negatively affecting the shared gameplay experience.
vipGuide.mandatoryRule3: All punishments (Kick, Ban, Voice Mute, Chat Ban) carried out by Special Members must include clear evidence (screenshots of violations or recorded match videos).
vipGuide.mandatoryRule4: <bold>ANY ABUSE OF ADMINISTRATIVE POWER WILL RESULT IN IMMEDIATE PRIVILEGE REVOCATION AND PERMANENT ACCOUNT TERMINATION WITHOUT COMPENSATION.</bold>
vipGuide.skinModContent: All members are free to change and customize weapon skins directly on the web dashboard and synchronize them instantly into the game through the portal:
vipGuide.tutorialOpenCategory: GREAT! PRESS <bold>E</bold> TO OPEN THE CATEGORY
vipGuide.tutorialCloseMenu: VERY GOOD! PRESS <bold>TAB</bold> TO CLOSE THE MENU
vipGuide.tutorialHintExit: Press TAB to close the menu
vipGuide.tutorialDoneHint: Type !admin into the input box to try reopening the control panel

rank.title: RANKING POINT ENCYCLOPEDIA TERMS
rank.subtitle: Official documentation of the scoring mechanism and ranking rules
rank.intro: Welcome to <bold>zRanks</bold> - the most brutal survival ranking system. This document provides a detailed guide on how the scoring system works and the rules players must understand to master the art of climbing the ranks.
rank.config_note: (Note: This document uses data from the system's default configuration. The hostage rescue feature is not applied in the current version).

constraints.title: 1. GENERAL MANDATORY CONDITIONS
constraints.desc: The zRanks system will temporarily stop calculating points (no points gained or lost) in the following situations:
constraints.c1: <bold>Minimum player requirement:</bold> The server must have at least <highlight>5 real players</highlight> (bots are not counted).
constraints.c2: <bold>Warmup period:</bold> Any kills during the pre-match warmup period will <highlightRed>not count for points</highlightRed>.
constraints.c3: <bold>Bot limitation:</bold> Killing bots or being killed by bots will not affect scores (<highlight>0 points</highlight>).
constraints.c4: <bold>Team mode:</bold> Free-for-all is not enabled; killing teammates will result in <highlightRed>extremely severe</highlightRed> point penalties.

vipBoost.title: 2. MEMBER PRIVILEGE MULTIPLIERS
vipBoost.desc: <bold>Only applies to Positive Values (Addition):</bold> Any positive point gain (enemy kills, bomb defusal, round victory...) will be multiplied:
vipBoost.c1: <bold>SVIP Members:</bold> Earned points are multiplied by <highlightRed>2.0x</highlightRed>.
vipBoost.c2: <bold>VIP Members:</bold> Earned points are multiplied by <highlightAmber>1.5x</highlightAmber>.
vipBoost.c3: <bold>No reduction for penalties:</bold> When losing points (being killed, suicide, answering side questions incorrectly), players will not receive any reduction to penalties. Members and regular players alike lose <highlightRed>100% of the base penalty points</highlightRed>.

dynamicElo.title: 3. POSITIVE SCORE BATTLEFIELD: DYNAMIC MULTIPLIER
dynamicElo.desc: This dynamic scoring feature is <highlight>ONLY ACTIVATED</highlight> when both players involved in combat have scores greater than <highlight>0</highlight>.
dynamicElo.desc2: The base kill points (+10) and base death penalty (-50) are multiplied by the score difference ratio: <underline>Ratio = Victim's Score / Killer's Score</underline>. This ratio is always limited between a minimum of <highlight>x3.0</highlight> and a maximum of <highlight>x6.0</highlight>.
dynamicElo.formula: Ratio = Victim's Score / Killer's Score (Limited from x3.0 to x6.0)
dynamicElo.matrixTitle: Combat Matrix: Positive Score Player vs Positive Score Player
dynamicElo.row1_name: Combat between top-ranked players (Example: Rank #1 kills Rank #2)
dynamicElo.row1_ratio: Limited to the minimum value of <highlight>3.0</highlight>
dynamicElo.row2_name: A newcomer (low score) kills the leaderboard leader (extremely high score)
dynamicElo.row2_ratio: Reaches the maximum reward multiplier of <highlight>6.0</highlight>
dynamicElo.row3_name: The leaderboard leader kills a newcomer (large score gap)
dynamicElo.row3_ratio: Limited to the minimum value of <highlight>3.0</highlight>
dynamicElo.conclusion: IMPORTANT CONCLUSION: Because the minimum multiplier is x3.0, every kill occurring between players with positive scores is amplified at least 3 times! The positive-score battlefield is always extremely brutal.

negativeZone.title: 4. NEGATIVE SCORE ZONE: WHEN THE SYSTEM IMPOSES LIMITATIONS
negativeZone.desc: If your score drops to <highlightRed>0</highlightRed> or below, you will enter the negative-score state. The system does <highlightRed>not automatically recover</highlightRed> your score, meaning you must personally earn points through kills to climb back up.
negativeZone.desc2: As long as one of the two players involved in combat has a negative score, the dynamic scoring system will <highlightRed>temporarily stop applying</highlightRed>, and all point calculations return to the default values:
negativeZone.c1: <bold>A negative-score player kills a positive-score player:</bold> The negative-score player receives the base <highlight>+10 points</highlight>. The positive-score player loses <highlightRed>-50 points</highlightRed>.
negativeZone.c1_ai: (Note: Negative-score players cannot gain massive rewards for killing top-ranked players, preventing score exploitation).
negativeZone.c2: <bold>A positive-score player kills a negative-score player:</bold> The positive-score player receives the base <highlight>+10 points</highlight>. The negative-score player loses <highlightRed>-50 points</highlightRed>.
negativeZone.c2_ai: (Note: Positive-score players gain very low rewards for killing negative-score players to encourage challenging stronger opponents).
negativeZone.c3: <bold>Two negative-score players kill each other:</bold> The killer gains <highlight>+10 points</highlight>, while the victim loses <highlightRed>-50 points</highlightRed>.
negativeZone.c3_note: (If membership privileges are active, the corresponding multiplier will still apply).

combat.title: 5. DETAILED COMBAT POINT TABLE
combat.desc: These point values can stack within a single kill event and are multiplied by membership bonuses if they are positive values.

tableA.title: A. Basic Points & Penalties
tableA.row3_note: Very severe penalty (The killed teammate still loses the base death penalty of <highlightRed>-50 points</highlightRed>).
tableA.row4_note: Very severe penalty (Except in cases of network disconnection).

tableB.title: B. Combat Skill Bonus Points
tableB.row3_note: Multiplied by the number of penetrated surfaces

tableC.title: C. Special Weapon Bonus Points
tableC.row5_name: Ultimate style kill: Throwing equipment directly to finish off an opponent with critically low HP

tableD.title: D. Kill Assist (Assist Points)
tableD.row3_name: Blinding teammates leading to their death
tableD.row3_note: Penalty for negative assists (<highlightRed>-150 points</highlightRed> for assisting team damage and <highlightRed>-100 points</highlightRed> for flashing teammates).
tableD.ai_note: (Note: Penalties for harmful team assists only apply when teammates directly kill each other under the negative effects caused by you).
tableD.user_note: (User note: If you flash a teammate but the enemy kills them, you will not lose points. However, if your teammates kill each other under that flash effect, you will receive a total penalty of <highlightRed>-250 points</highlightRed>).

tableE.title: E. Kill Streak Bonus Points (Reset Every Round)
tableE.row5_note: Receive an additional +55 points for every subsequent kill

objectives.title: 6. TACTICAL OBJECTIVE POINTS
objectives.desc: (Only applies to players actively participating in the match; spectators do not receive points).
objectives.row3_note: Additional bonus for the awarded player.
objectives.row5_note: Awarded only to the player who successfully performs the action.
objectives.row6_note: Awarded to all members of the bomb planting team.
objectives.row7_note: Slight point deduction and is not considered suicide.
objectives.row8_note: Play continuously for <highlight>10 minutes</highlight> (Only applies when the server meets the minimum player requirement).

minigame.title: 7. QUICK MATH MINI-GAME
minigame.desc: Every <highlight>10 minutes</highlight>, the system will display a random math equation on the screen. Use the command !aw <param>answer</param> to respond (Does not apply to spectators).
minigame.row1_note: Multiplied by membership bonus multiplier. The question immediately ends.
minigame.row4_note: <highlightRed>Locked out from answering the current question</highlightRed>.
minigame.ai_note: (Note: All penalties from incorrect answers are directly deducted from your ranking points and are not reduced by any membership multiplier).

rank.conclusion: This document serves as the official reference standard for players to understand and optimize their ranking points within the zRanks system.
